title: template_coverage_checked event payload
$comment: Provenance (WU 2.14, F2.4): authored 2026-04-22 in WU 2.6. Fields: involved_repos (required, array), task_count (required, integer). WU 2.11 extended the plan-review skill to re-emit this event on every successful Phase B re-ingest, making Phase B success observable in the audit trail.
description: Payload shape for the `template_coverage_checked` event emitted by the PM agent after a successful template coverage check on a feature's task graph. Absence of the event on a feature that reached `plan_review` indicates coverage escalated — the `human_escalation` event at feature level is the gap signal, not a separate `template_coverage_gap` event.

involved_repos.description: The component repos whose `.specfuse/templates.yaml` were read during the check. Duplicates the feature frontmatter's `involved_repos` at check time for event-log self-containment.

task_count.description: Number of tasks in the feature's task graph at check time. A task with empty `required_templates` counts — its coverage was trivially satisfied, but it was still walked.
